title: Rounding Rodeo
short_description: Herd stampeding numbers into the right corral by rounding fast — herd wrong and the number kicks the fence down and dances.
description: Numbers are stampeding across the ranch! Herd each one into the right corral by rounding it — to the nearest ten, hundred, thousand or whole number — before it gets away. Herd it wrong and the number kicks the fence down and does a smug little victory dance. Grade bands ramp from rounding 2-digit numbers to the nearest ten, to nearest ten and hundred with decoy corrals, to decimals and the nearest thousand under real time pressure. A free online rounding game for kids in grades 1–5, with speed and streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap the corral the number rounds to, before the timer runs out.
